meaning: n.蜡,蜡状物,增加,月亮由亏转盈vi.变大,增大,月亮渐满vt.上蜡于
examples: It was recorded on a wax cylinder.
Wax polish preserves wood and leather.
To wax eloquent about someone's embossed silver, sumptuous carpets or marble statuary was to indict him.
The frames are provided with a honeycomb texture for bees to build their wax cells on.
